title: Vanguard's Wrzesniewsky: Credit Holding on Pretty Well
summary: Vanguard Head of Fixed Income Client Portfolio Management Matt Wrzesniewsky discusses bonds losing more than $2 trillion as the war in Iran continues to cause ripples through markets. He talks with Katie Greifeld and Romaine Bostick on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Prologis CEO Sees Prolonged AI, Data Center Tailwinds
summary: Prologis CEO Dan Letter joins Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss the state of global logistics and shipping as geopolitics and associated risk impacts the firm's customer base. However, Prologis is optimistic about its data center business. Letter says the company's strong relationship with hyperscalers is ongoing, bolstering "a fortress of a balance sheet" as Prologis continues to secure longer-term power capacity. Letter speaks with Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Japan's closest garrison to Taiwan takes bigger role 10 years on

米中首脳会談 5月14日・15日に
Iran has no intention to hold talks with U.S; foreign minister says Trump proposal to end war being reviewed
summary: President Donald Trump has claimed the U.S. and Iran are "in negotiations now." But the Islamic Republic denies any direct talks to end the war.

title: McDonald’s could make $100 million in just the first few days of selling ‘KPop Demon Hunters’ meals
summary: Restaurant analyst says the tie-in with the Netflix film will be a huge hit for the Golden Arches

title: イギリスBBC 新会長にグーグルの元幹部を任命
summary: イギリスの公共放送BBCは、アメリカのトランプ大統領に関するドキュメンタリー番組への批判を受けて辞任を表明していた会長に代わり、IT大手グーグルの元幹部を新しい会長に任命したと発表しました。

title: 米メタとグーグルに損害賠償評決、未成年者ＳＮＳ依存巡り責任認定
